prompt: Write a function add(a, b) that returns the sum of two numbers.
Write a function subtract(a, b) that returns a minus b.
Write a function multiply(a, b) that returns the product of two numbers.
Write a function divide(a, b) that returns a divided by b, or 0 if b is 0.
Write a function factorial(n) that returns the factorial of n.
Write a function is_even(n) that returns True if n is even.
Write a function is_prime(n) that returns True if n is a prime number.
Write a function fibonacci(n) that returns the nth Fibonacci number.
Write a function reverse_string(s) that returns the reverse of s.
Write a function count_vowels(s) that returns the number of vowels in s.
Write a function max_of_three(a, b, c) that returns the largest of three numbers.
Write a function sum_list(lst) that returns the sum of all elements in lst.
Write a function find_max(lst) that returns the maximum element in lst.
Write a function is_palindrome(s) that returns True if s is a palindrome.
Write a function count_words(s) that returns the number of words in s.
Write a function celsius_to_fahrenheit(c) that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit.
Write a function fahrenheit_to_celsius(f) that converts Fahrenheit to Celsius.
Write a function area_of_circle(r) that returns the area of a circle with radius r.
Write a function perimeter_of_rectangle(l, w) that returns the perimeter.
Write a function gcd(a, b) that returns the greatest common divisor.
Write a function lcm(a, b) that returns the least common multiple.
Write a function sum_of_digits(n) that returns the sum of digits of n.
Write a function is_anagram(s1, s2) that returns True if s1 and s2 are anagrams.
Write a function flatten_list(nested) that flattens a nested list of integers.
Write a function remove_duplicates(lst) that returns a list with duplicates removed, preserving order.
Write a function merge_sorted_lists(l1, l2) that merges two sorted lists into one sorted list.
Write a function binary_search(lst, target) that returns the index of target or -1.
Write a function bubble_sort(lst) that returns a sorted list using bubble sort.
Write a function nth_root(x, n) that returns the nth root of x.
Write a function geometric_mean(lst) that returns the geometric mean of a list of positive numbers.
